milestones: The solution queries pg_stat_statements to analyze query execution statistics such as total calls, mean time, or rows returned
The solution queries pg_locks or related views to investigate lock contention in the database
The solution queries pg_stat_user_indexes and/or pg_indexes to check for redundant or unused indexes
The solution queries pg_stat_user_tables or pg_stat_all_tables to examine vacuum-related metrics such as dead tuples, last_autovacuum, or n_dead_tup
The solution investigates large data operations by examining rows fetched or inserted from pg_stat_statements or pg_stat_user_tables
The final answer selects exactly 2 root causes from the allowed list (INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA)
